Bambu hanya dipanen setelah matang minim: Bamboo is harvested only after it has matured for at least three years. We work with cooperative growers who replant after every harvest. The strips are split, dried, and woven by hand — no machines, no chemicals, no shortcuts.
Bambu tumbuh kembali dalam hitungan bula: Bamboo regrows in months, not decades. It needs no fertilizer, almost no water, and absorbs more CO₂ than most hardwoods. When a besek finally returns to the earth, it does so without leaving a trace.
